description: A credential is stored in plaintext vars and committed, leaking it into version control and logs.
body: Failure mode: a password, key, or token is placed in plaintext group_vars or inline in a task and committed, leaking the secret into version control history and task output. Detection signals: credentials visible in repo files or git history; secret values printed in play output; no vault encryption on sensitive files. Do not commit plaintext secrets. Safer fallback: move secrets into ansible-vault-encrypted files, set no_log on consuming tasks, and rotate any credential that was ever committed in clear text.
